leadText: If you were looking for the Mystery Dungeon item, see Food (Mystery Dungeon)→Banana. Banana (Japanese: バナナスライス Banana Slice) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very sweet ingredient. This go-to fruit is sweet and rich, and it's beloved by many Pokémon.
